name: Overview | Slack Developer Docs
snippet:
App Identity · Security concerns · Authentication and Token...
MCP standardizes how applications provide context to LLMs. With the Slack MCP server, your integrated apps can search channels, send messages, and perform other Slack actions through MCP clients. Workspace admins can approve and manage all MCP client integrations, keeping your Slack data safe.

name: Slack Securely Powers Your Third-Party Agents With Your Business
snippet:
Slack MCP server streamlines how large language models and AI agents access Slack data, providing conversational context to ground agent responses and actions.
Slack MCP server streamlines how large language models and AI agents access Slack data, providing conversational context to ground agent responses and actions. It serves as a unified, bidirectional communication layer that respects user permissions, reducing the need for complex, service-specific integrations.

name: Slack MCP Integration: Your Practical How-to Guide - Workato
snippet: Model Context Protocol (MCP) is a specification for exchanging context, capabilities, and structured actions between clients and servers.
